verses.latin_vulgate: Et cœpit Salomon ædificare domum Domini in Jerusalem in monte Moria, qui demonstratus fuerat David patri ejus, in loco quem paraverat David in area Ornan Jebusæi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣חֶל שְׁלֹמֹ֗ה לִבְנ֤וֹת אֶת־בֵּית־יְהֹוָה֙ בִּיר֣וּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם בְּהַר֙ הַמּ֣וֹרִיָּ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר נִרְאָ֖ה לְדָוִ֣יד אָבִ֑יהוּ אֲשֶׁ֤ר הֵכִין֙ בִּמְק֣וֹם דָּוִ֔יד בְּגֹ֖רֶן אׇרְנָ֥ן הַיְבוּסִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Solomon began to build the house of the Lord in Jerusalem, in mount Moria, which had been shewn to David his father, in the place which David had prepared in the thrashingfloor of Ornan the Jebusite.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Salomo rupesi rakentamaan Herran huonetta Jerusalemissa, Morian vuorelle, joka Davidille hänen isällensä neuvottu oli, Davidin paikkaan, jonka hän oli valmistanut Ornanin Jebusilaisen luvaan.
verses.king_james: Then Solomon began to build the house of the Lord at Jerusalem in mount Moriah, where the Lord appeared unto David his father, in the place that David had prepared in the threshingfloor of Ornan the Jebusite.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cœpit autem ædificare mense secundo, anno quarto regni sui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֠יָּ֠חֶל לִבְנ֞וֹת בַּחֹ֤דֶשׁ הַשֵּׁנִי֙ בַּשֵּׁנִ֔י בִּשְׁנַ֥ת אַרְבַּ֖ע לְמַלְכוּתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he began to build in the second month, in the fourth year of his reign.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän rupesi rakentamaan toisena kuukautena, toisena päivänä, neljäntenä valtakuntansa vuonna.
verses.king_james: And he began to build in the second day of the second month, in the fourth year of his reign.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et hæc sunt fundamenta quæ jecit Salomon, ut ædificaret domum Dei : longitudinis cubitos in mensura prima sexaginta, latitudinis cubitos viginti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֙לֶּה֙ הוּסַ֣ד שְׁלֹמֹ֔ה לִבְנ֖וֹת אֶת־בֵּ֣ית הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים הָאֹ֡רֶךְ אַמּ֞וֹת בַּמִּדָּ֤ה הָרִֽאשׁוֹנָה֙ אַמּ֣וֹת שִׁשִּׁ֔ים וְרֹ֖חַב אַמּ֥וֹת עֶשְׂרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now these are the foundations, which Solomon laid, to build the house of God, the length by the first measure sixty cubits, the breadth twenty cubits.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Salomo laski perustuksen, Jumalan huonetta rakentaa, ensisti pituudelle kuusikymmentä kyynärää, ja leveydelle kaksikymmentä kyynärää;
verses.king_james: Now these are the things wherein Solomon was instructed for the building of the house of God. The length by cubits after the first measure was threescore cubits, and the breadth twenty cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porticum vero ante frontem, quæ tendebatur in longum juxta mensuram latitudinis domus, cubitorum viginti : porro altitudo centum viginti cubitorum erat : et deauravit eam intrinsecus auro mundissimo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָאוּלָ֡ם אֲשֶׁר֩ עַל־פְּנֵ֨י הָאֹ֜רֶךְ עַל־פְּנֵ֤י רֹֽחַב־הַבַּ֙יִת֙ אַמּ֣וֹת עֶשְׂרִ֔ים וְהַגֹּ֖בַהּ מֵאָ֣ה וְעֶשְׂרִ֑ים וַיְצַפֵּ֥הוּ מִפְּנִ֖ימָה זָהָ֥ב טָהֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the porch in the front, which was extended in length according to the measure of the breadth of the house, twenty cubits: and the height was a hundred and twenty cubits: and he overlaid it within with pure gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta esihuoneen pituudelta huoneen leveyden jälkeen kaksikymmentä kyynärää, ja korkeus oli sata ja kaksikymmentä kyynärää; ja hän silasi sen sisältä puhtaalla kullalla.
verses.king_james: And the porch that was in the front of the house, the length of it was according to the breadth of the house, twenty cubits, and the height was an hundred and twenty: and he overlaid it within with pure gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domum quoque majorem texit tabulis ligneis abiegnis, et laminas auri obrizi affixit per totum : sculpsitque in ea palmas, et quasi catenulas se invicem complectentes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֣ת ׀ הַבַּ֣יִת הַגָּד֗וֹל חִפָּה֙ עֵ֣ץ בְּרוֹשִׁ֔ים וַיְחַפֵּ֖הוּ זָהָ֣ב ט֑וֹב וַיַּ֧עַל עָלָ֛יו תִּמֹרִ֖ים וְשַׁרְשְׁרֹֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the greater house he ceiled with deal boards, and overlaid them with plates of fine gold throughout: and he graved in them palm trees, and like little chains interlaced with one another.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta suuren huoneen peitti hän hongalla ja silasi sen päältä parhaalla kullalla, ja teki siihen päälle palmuin ja käädyin kaltaiset työt,
verses.king_james: And the greater house he cieled with fir tree, which he overlaid with fine gold, and set thereon palm trees and chains.

verses.latin_vulgate: Stravit quoque pavimentum templi pretiosissimo marmore, decore multo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְצַ֧ף אֶת־הַבַּ֛יִת אֶ֥בֶן יְקָרָ֖ה לְתִפְאָ֑רֶת וְהַזָּהָ֖ב זְהַ֥ב פַּרְוָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He paved also the floor of the temple with most precious marble, of great beauty.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja peitti huoneen kalliilla kivillä kaunistukseksi; ja kulta oli Parvaimin kulta.
verses.king_james: And he garnished the house with precious stones for beauty: and the gold was gold of Parvaim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro aurum erat probatissimum, de cujus laminis texit domum, et trabes ejus, et postes, et parietes, et ostia : et cælavit cherubim in parietibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְחַ֨ף אֶת־הַבַּ֜יִת הַקֹּר֧וֹת הַסִּפִּ֛ים וְקִירוֹתָ֥יו וְדַלְתוֹתָ֖יו זָהָ֑ב וּפִתַּ֥ח כְּרוּבִ֖ים עַל־הַקִּירֽוֹת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the gold of the plates with which he overlaid the house, and the beams thereof, and the posts, and the walls, and the doors was of the finest: and he graved cherubims on the walls.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän silasi huoneen kaaret, pihtipielet, seinät ja ovet kullalla, ja antoi leikata Kerubimeja seiniin.
verses.king_james: He overlaid also the house, the beams, the posts, and the walls thereof, and the doors thereof, with gold; and graved cherubims on the walls.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit quoque domum Sancti sanctorum : longitudinem juxta latitudinem domus cubitorum viginti : et latitudinem similiter viginti cubitorum : et laminis aureis texit eam, quasi talentis sexcentis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֙עַשׂ֙ אֶת־בֵּֽית־קֹ֣דֶשׁ הַקֳּדָשִׁ֔ים אׇרְכּ֞וֹ עַל־פְּנֵ֤י רֹֽחַב־הַבַּ֙יִת֙ אַמּ֣וֹת עֶשְׂרִ֔ים וְרׇחְבּ֖וֹ אַמּ֣וֹת עֶשְׂרִ֑ים וַיְחַפֵּ֙הוּ֙ זָהָ֣ב ט֔וֹב לְכִכָּרִ֖ים שֵׁ֥שׁ מֵאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also the house of the holy of holies: the length of it according to the breadth of the temple, twenty cubits, and the breadth of it in like manner twenty cubits: and he overlaid it with plates of gold, amounting to about six hundred talents.
verses.finnish_biblia: Teki hän myös kaikkein pyhimmän huoneen, jonka pituus oli kaksikymmentä kyynärää, huoneen leveyden jälkeen, ja hänen leveytensä oli kaksikymmentä kyynärää, ja silasi sen parhaalla kullalla, kuudellasadalla leiviskällä.
verses.king_james: And he made the most holy house, the length whereof was according to the breadth of the house, twenty cubits, and the breadth thereof twenty cubits: and he overlaid it with fine gold, amounting to six hundred talents.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et clavos fecit aureos, ita ut singuli clavi siclos quinquagenos appenderent : cœnacula quoque texit auro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִשְׁקָ֛ל לְמִסְמְר֥וֹת לִשְׁקָלִ֖ים חֲמִשִּׁ֣ים זָהָ֑ב וְהָעֲלִיּ֖וֹת חִפָּ֥ה זָהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also nails of gold, and the weight of every nail was fifty sicles: the upper chambers also he overlaid with gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös nauloihin antoi hän viisikymmentä sikliä kultaa, painon jälkeen; ja silasi salit kullalla.
verses.king_james: And the weight of the nails was fifty shekels of gold. And he overlaid the upper chambers with gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit etiam in domo Sancti sanctorum cherubim duos, opere statuario : et texit eos auro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֜עַשׂ בְּבֵֽית־קֹ֤דֶשׁ הַקֳּדָשִׁים֙ כְּרוּבִ֣ים שְׁנַ֔יִם מַעֲשֵׂ֖ה צַעֲצֻעִ֑ים וַיְצַפּ֥וּ אֹתָ֖ם זָהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also in the house of the holy of holies two cherubims of image work: and he overlaid them with gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin teki hän myös kaikkein pyhimpään huoneeseen kaksi Kerubimia liikkeillä olevalla teolla; ja he silasivat ne kullalla.
verses.king_james: And in the most holy house he made two cherubims of image work, and overlaid them with gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Alæ cherubim viginti cubitis extendebantur, ita ut una ala haberet cubitos quinque et tangeret parietem domus : et altera quinque cubitos habens, alam tangeret alterius cherub.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכַנְפֵי֙ הַכְּרוּבִ֔ים אׇרְכָּ֖ם אַמּ֣וֹת עֶשְׂרִ֑ים כְּנַ֨ף הָאֶחָ֜ד לְאַמּ֣וֹת חָמֵ֗שׁ מַגַּ֙עַת֙ לְקִ֣יר הַבַּ֔יִת וְהַכָּנָ֤ף הָאַחֶ֙רֶת֙ אַמּ֣וֹת חָמֵ֔שׁ מַגִּ֕יעַ לִכְנַ֖ף הַכְּר֥וּב הָאַחֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The wings of the cherubims were extended twenty cubits, so that one wing was five cubits long, and reached to the wall of the house: and the other was also five cubits long, and reached to the wing of the other cherub.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pituus oli Kerubimein siivillä kaksikymmentä kyynärää; niin että yksi siipi oli viisi kyynärää ja ulottui huoneen seinään, ja toinen siipi oli myös viisi kyynärää ja ulottui hamaan toisen Kerubimin siipeen.
verses.king_james: And the wings of the cherubims were twenty cubits long: one wing of the one cherub was five cubits, reaching to the wall of the house: and the other wing was likewise five cubits, reaching to the wing of the other cherub.

verses.latin_vulgate: Similiter cherub alterius ala, quinque habebat cubitos, et tangebat parietem : et ala ejus altera quinque cubitorum, alam cherub alterius contingebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְנַ֨ף הַכְּר֤וּב הָאֶחָד֙ אַמּ֣וֹת חָמֵ֔שׁ מַגִּ֖יעַ לְקִ֣יר הַבָּ֑יִת וְהַכָּנָ֤ף הָאַחֶ֙רֶת֙ אַמּ֣וֹת חָמֵ֔שׁ דְּבֵקָ֕ה לִכְנַ֖ף הַכְּר֥וּב הָאַחֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: In like manner the wing of the other cherub, was five cubits long, and reached to the wall: and his other wing was five cubits long, and touched the wing of the other cherub.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös oli toisen Kerubimin siipi viisi kyynärää pitkä ja ulottui huoneen seinään, ja toinen siipi myös oli viisi kyynärää pitkä ja riippui toisessa Kerubimin siivessä;
verses.king_james: And one wing of the other cherub was five cubits, reaching to the wall of the house: and the other wing was five cubits also, joining to the wing of the other cherub.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur alæ utriusque cherubim expansæ erant et extendebantur per cubitos viginti : ipsi autem stabant erectis pedibus, et facies eorum erant versæ ad exteriorem domum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּנְפֵי֙ הַכְּרוּבִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה פֹּרְשִׂ֖ים אַמּ֣וֹת עֶשְׂרִ֑ים וְהֵ֛ם עֹמְדִ֥ים עַל־רַגְלֵיהֶ֖ם וּפְנֵיהֶ֥ם לַבָּֽיִת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: So the wings of the two cherubims were spread forth, and were extended twenty cubits: and they stood upright on their feet, and their faces were turned toward the house without.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin että nämät Kerubimein siivet olivat levitettyinä kaksikymmentä kyynärää leveydelle; ja ne seisoivat jalkainsa päällä, ja heidän kasvonsa olivat käännetyt huoneesen päin.
verses.king_james: The wings of these cherubims spread themselves forth twenty cubits: and they stood on their feet, and their faces were inward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit quoque velum ex hyacintho, purpura, cocco, et bysso : et intexuit ei cherubim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֙עַשׂ֙ אֶת־הַפָּרֹ֔כֶת תְּכֵ֥לֶת וְאַרְגָּמָ֖ן וְכַרְמִ֣יל וּב֑וּץ וַיַּ֥עַל עָלָ֖יו כְּרוּבִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: He made also a veil of violet, purple, scarlet, and silk: and wrought in it cherubims.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän teki myös esiripun sinisistä, purpuraisista ja tulipunaisista villoista ja kalliista liinasta, ja teki Kerubimit siihen päälle.
verses.king_james: And he made the vail of blue, and purple, and crimson, and fine linen, and wrought cherubims thereon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ante fores etiam templi duas columnas, quæ triginta et quinque cubitos habebant altitudinis : porro capita earum, quinque cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֜עַשׂ לִפְנֵ֤י הַבַּ֙יִת֙ עַמּוּדִ֣ים שְׁנַ֔יִם אַמּ֕וֹת שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים וְחָמֵ֖שׁ אֹ֑רֶךְ וְהַצֶּ֥פֶת אֲשֶׁר־עַל־רֹאשׁ֖וֹ אַמּ֥וֹת חָמֵֽשׁ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: He made also before the doors of the temple two pillars, which were five and thirty cubits high: and their chapiters were five cubits.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki huoneen eteen kaksi patsasta, viisineljättäkymmentä kyynärää korkiaksi, ja niiden päälle kruunun viisi kyynärää korkian,
verses.king_james: Also he made before the house two pillars of thirty and five cubits high, and the chapiter that was on the top of each of them was five cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Necnon et quasi catenulas in oraculo, et superposuit eas capitibus columnarum : malogranata etiam centum, quæ catenulis interposuit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֤עַשׂ שַׁרְשְׁרוֹת֙ בַּדְּבִ֔יר וַיִּתֵּ֖ן עַל־רֹ֣אשׁ הָעַמֻּדִ֑ים וַיַּ֤עַשׂ רִמּוֹנִים֙ מֵאָ֔ה וַיִּתֵּ֖ן בַּֽשַּׁרְשְׁרֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also as it were little chains in the oracle, and he put them on the heads of the pillars: and a hundred pomegranates, which he put between the little chains.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja käädyin kaltaiset työt kuoriin, ja sovitti ne patsasten päälle, ja teki sata granatin omenaa, ja asetti ne käädytekoin päälle.
verses.king_james: And he made chains, as in the oracle, and put them on the heads of the pillars; and made an hundred pomegranates, and put them on the chains.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsas quoque columnas posuit in vestibulo templi, unam a dextris, et alteram a sinistris : eam quæ a dextris erat, vocavit Jachin : et quæ ad lævam, Booz.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֤קֶם אֶת־הָֽעַמּוּדִים֙ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י הַהֵיכָ֔ל אֶחָ֥ד מִיָּמִ֖ין וְאֶחָ֣ד מֵֽהַשְּׂמֹ֑אול וַיִּקְרָ֤א שֵׁם־[הַיְמָנִי֙] (הימיני) יָכִ֔ין וְשֵׁ֥ם הַשְּׂמָאלִ֖י בֹּֽעַז׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: These pillars he put at the entrance of the temple, one on the right hand, and the other on the left: that which was on the right hand, he called Jachin: and that on the left hand, Booz.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pystytti patsaat templin eteen, yhden oikialle ja toisen vasemmalle puolelle, ja kutsui sen nimen, joka oikialla puolella oli, Jakin, ja sen nimen, joka vasemmalla puolella oli, Boas.
verses.king_james: And he reared up the pillars before the temple, one on the right hand, and the other on the left; and called the name of that on the right hand Jachin, and the name of that on the left Boaz.
